candidates.why: Explicit operating revenue line; conceptually matches total revenue but appears unpopulated in preview; kept as lower-priority fallback.
Primary labeled revenue line with substantial positive amounts across years; best match for total revenue/sales.
Cost line, not revenue; excluded from final choice.

candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue; excluded.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income (loss) for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue; excluded.

candidates.why: Deferred revenue liability; not the revenue line itself; excluded.

variables.notes: Two identically labeled 'Revenue' rows exist; both are included so downstream logic can pick whichever is populated per year. 'Operating revenue' is added as a lower-priority fallback label.

candidates.why: Could be part of operating overhead or other direct costs; not clearly SG&A-only. Prefer explicit 'Cost of Sales' for COGS.
Likely direct operating costs of vessels (COGS-like), but more specific and potentially partial; 'Cost of Sales' is the main aggregate COGS line, so this is not chosen to avoid double counting.
Likely SG&A/overhead, not pure COGS; excluded for COGS.
Standard label for cost of goods sold / cost of sales; two such rows exist and represent direct production/service costs.
Clearly SG&A, not COGS; excluded.
Likely SG&A personnel costs; excluded from COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS; excluded.
Financing costs, not COGS; excluded.
Net financing result, not COGS; excluded.
Discontinued operations result, not COGS; excluded.
Discontinued operations, not COGS; excluded.
Balance sheet accrued expenses, not the COGS line; excluded.
Balance sheet accrued expenses, not direct cost of sales; excluded.

variables.notes: Both 'Cost of Sales' rows are included as potential COGS lines so that downstream logic can select the first non-missing value per year.

candidates.why: Generic operating expense that is likely overhead rather than COGS; appropriate as an SG&A component.
These appear to be direct vessel operating costs (more akin to COGS); excluded from SG&A to avoid mixing direct and overhead costs.
Explicit operating expense bucket; likely includes various overhead costs; good SG&A component.
Classic SG&A category covering administrative overhead; primary SG&A component.
Personnel/employee costs, typically part of SG&A; appropriate component.
Equity account, not an expense line; excluded from SG&A components.

variables.notes: Multiple operating overhead components are selected as SG&A: general & administrative, personnel, and other operating expenses. Direct ship operating expenses and equity items are excluded to avoid misclassifying COGS or balance sheet accounts as SG&A.

No explicit research & development expense line (e.g., 'Research and development', 'R&D') is present in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet preview. XRD is therefore set to an empty list, implying zero for PROF purposes.

candidates.why: Main interest expense line; best representation of recurring financing costs.
Interest on supplier-related financing; secondary form of interest expense, included as fallback.

candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of interest on lease liabilities; tertiary interest expense source.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense; excluded.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense; excluded.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Multiple interest expense labels are provided in priority order so downstream logic can use the first non-missing value per year.

candidates.why: Component of equity related to share-based programmes; too narrow to represent total book equity; excluded.
Represents total shareholders' equity; no separate parent vs. non-controlling interest lines are present, so this is the best available proxy for BE.
Duplicate total equity label with identical values; only one of the duplicates is needed to avoid redundancy.
Technical balancing row, not the substantive equity total; excluded.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row to force equality; not an equity measure; excluded.
Total assets/liabilities plus equity; not pure equity; excluded.

variables.notes: No separate 'equity attributable to owners/parent' vs. 'non-controlling interests' lines are available; thus 'Total equity' is used as BE, and MIB is set to zero to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement flow metric, not a balance sheet minority interest account; cannot be used for MIB.

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for minority interest / non-controlling interests is present (e.g., 'Non-controlling interests', 'Minority interest'). MIB is therefore set to an empty list, implying zero in PROF computations.
